title: Myrmecodendron × standleyi

intro: Myrmecodendron × standleyi, also known as Standley's ant tree, is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant in the family Sapotaceae, native to Central America. The plant has been reported to possess several health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in the treatment of various conditions such as wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues.
